song.title: I Hear Thy Wlecome Voice
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) I hear Thy welcome voice, That calls me, Lord, to Thee, For cleansing in Thy precious blood That flowed on Calvary.
[C] Chorus I am coming Lord! Coming now to Thee! Wash me, cleanse me in the blood That flowed on Calvary.
[V2] 2) Though coming weak and vile, Thou dost my strength assure; Thou dost my vileness fully cleanse, Till spotless all, and pure.
[V3] 3) ’Tis Jesus who confirms The blessed work within, By adding grace to welcomed grace, Where reigned the pow’r of sin.
[V4] 4) And He the witness gives To loyal hearts and free, That every promise is fulfilled, If faith but brings the plea.
[V5] 5) All hail, atoning blood! All hail, redeeming grace! All hail, the gift of Christ our Lord, Our strength and righteousness.
song.author: Lewis hartsough
